tweets.content: 𝕏 is a great platform for product announcements, especially if done by the CEO directly. Way more interesting to the public than generic press releases. This post by Mark Zuckerberg already received over 12 million views for free!
tweets.translated: 𝕏 是一个很好的产品发布平台，尤其是由首席执行官直接发布时。比一般的新闻稿对公众来说更有趣。马克·扎克伯格的这篇文章已经获得了超过 1200 万次免费浏览！

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Wally Funk waited 60 years to get to space, and no one ever earned it more. She trained with the Mercury 13 in 1961, out-tested the men, and was told no anyway. She never stopped flying — 19,600 hours, thousands of students, a lifetime of firsts. Five years ago this month, I had the honor of flying with her on New Shepard's first crewed flight. At 82, she was fearless, joyful, and asking to go again before we’d even landed. Her dream took six decades, but it came true. Dreams have no expiration date. Godspeed, Wally.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：Wally Funk 等了 60 年才进入太空，没有人比他赚得更多。 1961 年，她在水星 13 号上接受训练，在测试中胜过了男子，但最终还是被告知不行。她从未停止过飞行——19,600 小时、数千名学生、一生的第一次。五年前的这个月，我有幸与她一起乘坐新谢泼德号的首次载人飞行。 82 岁的她无所畏惧、充满快乐，甚至在我们落地之前就要求再去一次。她的梦想花了六年的时间，终于实现了。梦想没有保质期。祝你好运，沃利。

tweets.content: Starlink can now provide reliable 10Gpbs symmetric send/receive connectivity anywhere in the world
tweets.translated: Starlink 现在可以在世界任何地方提供可靠的 10Gpbs 对称发送/接收连接

tweets.content: 5000 POS terminals of Alatau City Bank in Kazakhstan 🇰🇿 are powered by Binance Pay!
tweets.translated: 哈萨克斯坦阿拉套城市银行🇰🇿的5000台POS终端由Binance Pay提供支持！

tweets.content: "China is shipping ~90% of the world's humanoid robots. We cannot keep taking them lightly." Elon's comment: "For now" Meanwhile, 1X today posts a video of the most advanced humanoid hand. Looks like the inflection point for American humanoid programs is here? Both technologically with players like 1X and with mass production with $TSLA? I'm am personally long on Agility through $CCXI targeting commercialization with Amazon and others. But I'm proud to see American robotics as a whole go brrrr.
tweets.translated: “中国运送了全球约 90% 的人形机器人。我们不能再掉以轻心。” Elon 的评论：“现在” 与此同时，1X 今天发布了一段最先进的人形手的视频。看来美国人形项目的拐点已经到来了？无论是在技术上与 1X 等公司合作，还是在大规模生产方面与 TSLA 合作？我个人看好 $CCXI 的敏捷性，目标是与亚马逊和其他公司进行商业化。但我很自豪看到美国机器人技术整体上取得了巨大进步。

tweets.content: Three new $SIVE insider purchases today. Most notably: $SIVEF CEO Vikram bought 1,000,000 SEK worth of shares on the open market today. This is following the massive drop on Sivers stock following 2 misleading CPO delay reports, Meta Compute headlines, and another insider sale report from another photonics director. Typically, insider sells for any number of reasons. But having the CEO buy on the open-market is the clearest signal in management confidence. Following $GFS, $JBL, and other laser supplier partnerships, and his goal of NASDAQ listing in the near term. Feels like the CEO sees a clear potential for Sivers to become the next photonics giant (myself included).
tweets.translated: 今天三笔新的 $SIVE 内部购买。最值得注意的是：$SIVEF 首席执行官 Vikram 今天在公开市场上购买了价值 1,000,000 瑞典克朗的股票。此前，在两份误导性的 CPO 延迟报告、Meta Compute 头条新闻以及另一位光子学总监的另一份内幕销售报告之后，Sivers 股票大幅下跌。通常，内部人士出于多种原因出售。但让首席执行官在公开市场上购买股票是管理层信心的最明确信号。继$GFS、$JBL等激光供应商合作之后，他的目标是近期在纳斯达克上市。感觉首席执行官看到了西弗斯成为下一个光子巨头（包括我自己）的明显潜力。

tweets.content: Nothing like an internal $META memo getting published. Showing AI ramping as usual: - LTAs signed with Samsung and $SNDK for memory - LTAs signed with Sumitomo Electric for fiber optics - Expected to deploy 7GW compute infra this year, and doubling in 2027. - as much as $145B capex spend this year “It plans to launch a chip about every six months through 2027”
tweets.translated: 没有什么比发布内部 $META 备忘录更好的了。与往常一样，人工智能正在蓬勃发展： - 与三星签署了长期协议，并签署了 $SNDK 内存协议 - 与住友电工签署了光纤长期协议 - 预计今年将部署 7GW 计算基础设施，并在 2027 年翻倍。 - 今年资本支出高达 145B 美元 “计划到 2027 年大约每六个月推出一款芯片”
